description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named push CI CD that runs on every push to the master branch. The workflow consists of two jobs: testing_job and build_and_publish_job. The testing_job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with a matrix of Python versions 3.9, 3.10, and 3.11, checks out the code, installs dependencies, lints with flake8, and tests with pytest. The build_and_publish_job depends on testing_job, sets up Python 3.x, installs dependencies, builds the package, and publishes it to PyPI using the pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish action.
